news.t: The ETF Evolution: How a 1993 Idea Changed Investing

holdings.infoBox: BKLC is an equity ETF with a total of 508 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.56%, Apple at 6.46%, Microsoft at 4.46%, Amazon.com at 3.60%, and Alphabet at 3.27%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon US Large Cap Core Equity ETF (BKLC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive GBS United States 500 index. The fund tracks an index of the 500 largest companies in the US equity market, selected and weighted based on their respective market capitalization across all sectors. BKLC was launched on Apr 9, 2020 and is issued by BNY Mellon.

data.title: The ETF Evolution: How a 1993 Idea Changed Investing
data.text: Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) have been around for over three decades. Objectively, they've come way farther than investors and advisors ever expected back at launch.

data.title: BNY Announces ETF Share Splits
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BNY Mellon ETF Investment Adviser, LLC today announced that five of their ETFs will undergo forward share splits at a ratio of 3-for-1. A forward share split increases an ET...
